items.summary: Remove the Dashboard page route and all navigation links pointing to it from the React app (frontend/src/App.tsx and frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx). The Dashboard page (frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx) should no longer be accessible or linked.

Remove the Food Listings page route and navigation link from the React app (frontend/src/App.tsx and frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx). The FoodListings page should no longer be accessible or linked.

Remove the Admin NGO Approval page route and navigation link ('Admin: NGOs') from the React app (frontend/src/App.tsx and frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx). The AdminNGOApproval page should no longer be accessible or linked from the main navigation.

Update the Navigation component (frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx) so it only contains links to: Home, Donate (Donor Form), Get Help (Assistance Request Form), Volunteer, and NGO Register. All other nav links must be removed.

On the Food Listings page (frontend/src/pages/FoodListings.tsx) and in the backend (backend/main.mo), add 'Accept' and 'Mark as Collected' action buttons to each donation card. NGOs should be able to click 'Accept' to mark a donation as 'Accepted' and 'Mark as Collected' to mark it as 'Collected'. The donation status must be persisted in the backend. Display the current status as a badge on each donation card ('Available' in green, 'Accepted' in orange/sky-blue, 'Collected' in gray).

Re-expose the Food Listings page as an accessible route (e.g., /listings) and add it back to navigation — but only if REQ-30 conflicts with the NGO 'Accept'/'Collected' feature (REQ-33). If the Food Listings page is needed for NGOs to take action on donations, keep it in the nav under a label like 'Food Listings' or 'Manage Donations'. Otherwise, keep it removed.

Update the Home landing page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) to remove any references to the Dashboard or Food Listings in its CTA buttons or feature highlights. Keep only the 'Donate Food' and 'Get Help' CTA buttons. Remove any platform stats counters (total donations, volunteers, requests) from the Home page.
